name: MHA Reaction Room
description:
So, I just wanna point out, I’ve seen maybe two or three similar bots here on janitor.ai but they use the “name: dialogue” thing, which I absolutely despise. This is nothing against those who do use this way of writing, and the reaction room bots I have seen here are actually really good, but I wanted to make my own.

I’m only going to be involving Aizawa and Class 1-A bc I’m lazy and also bc I genuinely have no clue what this says about my mental state.
creator: Mythology011
